ground_truth.title: 2025 Cleaning Industry Trends to Know for a Thriving Business
ground_truth.author: Lisa Pham
ground_truth.main_content: Big changes are coming to the cleaning industry in 2025. From the rise of cutting-edge cleaning technology to a shift toward greener cleaning practices, there's a lot happening. It's an exciting time to run a cleaning business, and staying on top of these cleaning industry trends will help you stand out and succeed. The global cleaning services market size was about USD 415.93 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a rate of 6.9% from 2025 to 2030. The North American cleaning industry is estimated to hold the largest revenue share of 45% by 2037. A 3% employment growth is expected for janitors and building cleaners from 2023 to 2033. The global contract commercial cleaning sector has the largest revenue share at 49.7%. The global cleaning service software market is expected to hit USD 2.65 billion in 2028, growing at a rate of 10.3%. Key trends include market demand taking off, growing demand for cleaning workers, employee wellness becoming a bigger priority, residential spending rising, commercial spending leading the market, inflation easing but pricing pressures continuing, premium cleaning services gaining popularity, flexible cleaning schedules on the rise, green cleaning becoming a new standard, more businesses embracing cleaning technology, and cleaning business owners investing in software.
with: The global cleaning services market size was about USD 415.93 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a rate of 6.9% from 2025 to 2030.
A 3% employment growth is expected for janitors and building cleaners from 2023 to 2033.
The global contract commercial cleaning sector has the largest revenue share at 49.7%.
The global cleaning service software market is expected to hit USD 2.65 billion in 2028, growing at a rate of 10.3%.
